name: knowledge-space-codex
description: Portable Codex plugin for auditing, building, verifying, and diagramming Knowledge Space projects.

interface.shortDescription: Audit, build, verify, and diagram KS projects safely.
interface.longDescription: A stand-agnostic Knowledge Space toolkit for API-first project audits and safe project-scoped edits; course and scratch-project reconstruction; models, classes, indicators, formulas, objects and data; tables, dashboards, publications, Gantt, integrations and BPMS; browser-assisted verification; and an offline, manifest-bound KS backup to Diagramm JSON round-trip. The diagram workflow supports schema 1.2, read-only indicator and formula provenance, non-numeric indicator presentation as attributes, per-class object counts, source-bound change plans, structural validation, cloned-backup packing, and isolated restore/read-back gates. Runtime actions remain available through exact-approved flows, while destructive or live restore actions require a separate target-specific approval.
defaultPrompt: Recreate or verify this KS course project.
Prepare a KS backup to Diagramm round-trip.
